description_long: This bird features a slender body with a long, pointed tail and a sharp, slightly curved beak. Its plumage is predominantly a rich golden-yellow on the underparts and lower flanks, while the upperparts and wings are mostly black with distinct white patches and streaks. The head is dark, blending into the back, and the wings show a striking contrast between black and white. The legs are short and dark, barely visible beneath the body. The overall appearance is sleek and streamlined, suggesting a bird adapted for agile flight and perching in urban or park environments.
description: A slender bird with golden-yellow underparts, black upperparts, and white wing patches, featuring a pointed tail and sharp beak.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's long, pointed tail, golden-yellow belly, and black upperparts with white wing markings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded head, sharp beak, and the yellow coloration on the chest.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same color pattern as view 0, with the beak and tail clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the pointed tail, dark back, and the symmetrical white markings on the wings.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid yellow underparts, black upperparts with white wing patches and streaks
